text:

poudriere build log

Hi,

For some reason my thunderbird builds are failing with errors such as:

Unified_cpp_widget_gtk0.cpp:(.text._ZN20WaylandDMABufSurface16GlobalRefReleaseEv
+0x24): undefined reference to `epoll_shim_read'
Unified_cpp_widget_gtk0.cpp:(.text._ZN20WaylandDMABufSurface12GlobalRefAddEv+0x2
c): undefined reference to `epoll_shim_write'

Not entirely sure why.  Any help please?

Poudriere build log attached

Thank you
